tasks.label: Build GUI
tasks.command: export PATH=/mingw64/bin:$PATH && cd /c/Users/Julianna/Project/TempLibraryManagement && gcc $(pkg-config --cflags gtk+-3.0) -o library_gui.exe main_gui.c file_io.c utils.c display.c search.c borrow.c admin.c menu.c gui/gui_common.c gui/gui_login.c gui/gui_main_window.c gui/gui_book_details.c gui/gui_borrow_dialog.c gui/gui_add_book.c gui/gui_delete_dialog.c $(pkg-config --libs gtk+-3.0)
